# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create Docker Compose configuration for ELK stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana). Define services for log collection, storage, and visualization. Configure Logstash pipelines for log parsing. Expose Kibana UI and Elasticsearch ports for access. This is for our centralized logging platform.
# Category: elasticsearch_logs_exposed

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-deployment
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: kibana

  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: kibana

    spec:
      containers:

      - name: kibana

        # TODO fill in
        image:  #<image>
        ports:
        - containerPort:   #<port number>
          name: http

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: my-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-deployment
  type: ClusterIP

  # TODO fill in
  ports:

  - port:  <container-port >
    targetPort: <port number>
